subject: fix(security): add iframe sandbox, referrer-policy, expand security TODOs
body:
- EmbedCodeDialog: add sandbox="allow-same-origin allow-scripts
  allow-popups allow-forms" to generated iframe embed snippet. Prevents
  embedded forms from accessing parent page context or navigating it.
- index.html: add referrer-policy meta tag (strict-origin-when-cross-origin)
  to prevent full URL leakage to third parties.
- TODO.md: expand backend security headers item with specific CSP,
  X-Frame-Options, and CORS recommendations.

Tags: security, embed, headers
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
